name: GTS Scenarios
description:
A 'You set the story' Giantess/giant bot.

Shrink whoever you want, grow whoever you want, experience any size play scenarios you want. BK have it your way.

It can be people you know, fictional characters, or anyone in all of history or someone you made up on the spot.

Don't ask me how, but Tales From Ba Sing Se inspired me to make this bot.


If ya want you can check my profile for more bots
For more giantess, giants, and tiny people click here
creator: Giants and More
